description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to publish a Docker image when pushing to the master branch or tags matching v*.*.*. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest job with write permission to packages and read permission to repository contents. It checks out the code, sets up QEMU, Docker Buildx, and logs in to DockerHub using GITHUB_TOKEN from secrets. Then it extracts metadata, builds a multi-platform container image from the src context, and pushes it to the GitHub Packages registry.
